meta_description: Sunday Hotel Wismar – a 4-star hotel near the historic Hanseatic city of Wismar with 177 rooms, wellness, gastronomy, family facilities and meeting spaces.
hero_subtitle: Relax, explore and meet near the historic Hanseatic city of Wismar.
hero_slide2_desc: Modern air-conditioned rooms with orthopedic mattresses and free Wi-Fi.
hero_slide3_desc: Indoor pool, saunas, steam bath, jacuzzis, fitness and rooftop terrace.
quote_text: A peaceful 4-star retreat surrounded by Mecklenburg greenery and close to the Baltic Sea coast.
discover_title: Your Gateway to Wismar and the Baltic Coast
discover_desc: The Sunday Hotel Wismar is set in the picturesque coastal and lake landscape of Mecklenburg, just minutes from the gates of the historic Hanseatic city of Wismar. Surrounded by greenery and close to the Baltic Sea coast, it is ideal for relaxation, exploration and business events.
accommodation_title: Comfortable Rooms with a Maritime Atmosphere
accommodation_desc: Choose from 177 modern air-conditioned guest rooms equipped with orthopedic mattresses, satellite TV, telephone, free Wi-Fi and private bathrooms with bathtub, WC, magnifying mirror and hairdryer. Barrier-free rooms are available on request.
wellness_title: Active Relaxation for Body, Mind & Soul
wellness_desc: Unwind in the Wissemare wellness area with an indoor pool, Finnish sauna, log cabin sauna, steam bath, jacuzzis, rooftop terrace and fitness studio — open year-round for guests of all ages.
pet_desc: Sunday Hotel Wismar is a pet-friendly hotel. Your four-legged companion is welcome to join your Baltic Sea getaway. Please inform us at the time of booking and note that pets are not permitted inside dining and wellness facilities.
footer_copy: © 2026 Sunday Hotel Wismar. All rights reserved.
about_meta_description: Discover Sunday Hotel Wismar – a 4-star hotel near the historic Hanseatic city of Wismar with 177 rooms, wellness, gastronomy, family facilities and conference spaces.
about_hero_desc: A relaxing 4-star hotel near the Baltic Sea and the historic Hanseatic city of Wismar.
about_nature_title: A Hotel Surrounded by Mecklenburg Nature
about_nature_desc: Sunday Hotel Wismar is set in the picturesque coastal and lake landscape of Mecklenburg, just minutes from the gates of the historic Hanseatic city of Wismar. Surrounded by lush greenery and with quick access to the Baltic Sea coast, the hotel is an ideal starting point for discovering the beautiful north of Germany.
about_guest_title: A Place for Relaxation, Families and Events
about_guest_desc: Whether you are seeking a peaceful wellness retreat, a family holiday by the Baltic Sea, a romantic break in one of Germany’s most charming UNESCO World Heritage cities, or a professional conference setting, Sunday Hotel Wismar offers everything you need under one roof.
about_location_desc: Sunday Hotel Wismar is perfectly positioned for exploring the Mecklenburg Baltic Coast, from UNESCO-listed old towns and sandy beaches to cycling trails, lake landscapes and charming coastal destinations.
about_attr1: Wismar UNESCO World Heritage City – approx. 6 km
about_attr2: Nearest Baltic Sea beach – approx. 4 km
about_why1: Close to the Baltic Sea coast and sandy beaches
about_why2: Minutes from historic Wismar old town
about_why3: Ideal for cycling, hiking and outdoor discovery
about_why4: A peaceful base for families, couples and business travelers
about_values_title: Experience the Best of Sunday Hotel Wismar
about_val1_desc: 177 modern air-conditioned guest rooms with orthopedic mattresses, satellite TV, free Wi-Fi and private bathrooms.
about_val2_desc: Relax in the indoor pool, Finnish sauna, log cabin sauna, steam bath, jacuzzis, rooftop terrace and fitness studio.
about_val3_desc: Enjoy fresh, seasonal and regional cuisine in Bellevue restaurant, drinks at WisBar and relaxing moments on the garden terrace.
about_val4_desc: Nine flexible conference rooms for up to 350 participants, modern AV technology, catering options and 160 on-site parking spaces.
contact_meta_description: Contact Sunday Hotel Wismar for bookings, wellness stays, family holidays, gastronomy, meetings, events and conferences near the historic Hanseatic city of Wismar.
contact_desc: Plan your stay at Sunday Hotel Wismar
contact_train_desc: Regular bus connections from the hotel reach Wismar city center in just a few minutes.
contact_car_desc: Sunday Hotel Wismar is located just minutes from the gates of historic Wismar, with quick access to the Baltic Sea coast and 160 parking spaces on-site, including 3 EV charging stations.
contact_region_desc: Wismar old town is approximately 6 km away, the nearest Baltic Sea beach is around 4 km away, and Boltenhagen seaside resort is approximately 19 km from the hotel.
gastro_meta_description: Enjoy regional and seasonal cuisine at Sunday Hotel Wismar, including Bellevue Restaurant, WisBar and the garden terrace.
gastro_desc: A culinary journey through Mecklenburg at Sunday Hotel Wismar
gastro_overview_desc: At Sunday Hotel Wismar, we invite you to enjoy the flavors of the region. Our restaurant team takes pride in serving fresh, seasonal and regional dishes in a warm and welcoming atmosphere.
gastro_rest1_desc: Our sun-filled Bellevue restaurant is the heart of our culinary offering. Start your day with a generous breakfast buffet featuring fresh bread, regional cheeses and cold cuts, egg dishes, fruits, cereals and hot beverages. In the evening, enjoy a varied dinner buffet or a carefully crafted 3-course menu using regional and seasonal ingredients from Mecklenburg.
gastro_rest2_desc: In the evening, Bellevue Restaurant welcomes you with a varied dinner buffet or a carefully prepared 3-course menu. Enjoy seasonal ingredients, regional flavors and relaxed service after a day in Wismar or along the Baltic coast.
gastro_rest2_time: Dinner: daily, times may vary — please check at reception.
gastro_rest3_desc: After dinner or a long day of sightseeing, our cozy WisBar invites you to relax with a refreshing drink, a glass of regional wine or one of our famous cocktails. The friendly atmosphere makes it the perfect place to finish the day.
gastro_rest3_time: Perfect for evening drinks, cocktails and regional wines.
gastro_rest4_desc: When the weather is fine, our garden terrace is the place to be. Enjoy your breakfast, afternoon coffee or evening drink in the fresh Mecklenburg air, surrounded by greenery.
gastro_rest4_time: Open in suitable weather for breakfast, coffee and drinks.
gastro_rest5_desc: Families are warmly welcome at Sunday Hotel Wismar. Our restaurant offers children’s menus and high-chair service, while the breakfast and dinner buffets include plenty of options young guests will enjoy. Dietary requirements can be accommodated on request.
gastro_rest5_time: Children’s menus and high chairs available.
gastro_cta_title: Enjoy Regional Flavors at Sunday Hotel Wismar
gastro_cta_desc: From breakfast in Bellevue Restaurant to evening drinks at WisBar, discover relaxed dining in the heart of Mecklenburg.
ta_meta_description: Discover the Mecklenburg Baltic Coast around Sunday Hotel Wismar, including Wismar UNESCO Old Town, Baltic Sea beaches, Schwerin, phanTechnikum, cycling and hiking.
ta_desc: Discover the Mecklenburg Baltic Coast from Sunday Hotel Wismar
ta_overview_desc: Sunday Hotel Wismar is perfectly positioned to explore the highlights of the Mecklenburg Baltic Coast region. From UNESCO-listed old towns and sandy beaches to cycling trails and charming lake landscapes, the area has something for every visitor.
ta_attr1_desc: The historic Hanseatic city of Wismar is just 6 km from the hotel and is known for its medieval architecture, market square and lively harbor.
ta_attr2_desc: The nearest Baltic Sea beach is just 4 km from the hotel, while Boltenhagen seaside resort is approximately 19 km away.
ta_attr3_desc: Visit Schwerin with its spectacular fairytale castle, charming old town, museums and renowned state theater.
ta_attr4_desc: An interactive science and technology museum with fascinating hands-on exhibitions for families and curious minds.
ta_attr5_desc: Well-marked trails lead through forests, along the coast and past picturesque villages around Wismar and Mecklenburg.
ta_cta_desc: Explore Wismar, the Baltic Sea coast and the Mecklenburg countryside while staying at Sunday Hotel Wismar.
ta_wismar_modal: The historic Hanseatic city of Wismar, just 6 km from the hotel, is one of the most beautiful cities in northern Germany. Explore its medieval architecture, charming market square, impressive churches and lively harbor.
ta_beaches_modal: The nearest Baltic Sea beach is just 4 km from the hotel, ideal for a spontaneous swim or a relaxed walk along the shore. Boltenhagen seaside resort is approximately 19 km away and offers wide sandy beaches and a lively promenade.
ta_schwerin_modal: Schwerin is known for its spectacular fairytale castle set on an island in Schwerin Lake, as well as its charming old town, museums and state theater. It is a perfect day trip from Sunday Hotel Wismar.
ta_phantechnikum_modal: The phanTechnikum in Wismar is an interactive science and technology museum with hands-on exhibitions for all ages, making it a popular destination for families and curious minds.
ta_cycling_modal: The area around Wismar and the Mecklenburg coast is ideal for cyclists and hikers. Well-marked trails lead through forests, along the coast and past picturesque villages.
gallery_meta_description: Discover Sunday Hotel Wismar through our gallery, from comfortable rooms and Wissemare wellness to Bellevue restaurant and the beautiful Mecklenburg surroundings.
gallery_desc: Get a first impression of Sunday Hotel Wismar
gallery_img1: Comfortable standard rooms with maritime atmosphere
gallery_img2: Superior rooms with additional comfort and space
gallery_img3: Spacious family rooms for parents and children
gallery_img4: Wissemare wellness area with pool, saunas and relaxation spaces
gallery_img6: Bellevue Restaurant serving regional and seasonal cuisine
gallery_img7: WisBar for drinks, regional wine and cocktails
gallery_img9: Historic Wismar UNESCO World Heritage city
gallery_img10: Baltic Sea beaches near Sunday Hotel Wismar
gallery_img11: Schwerin, the city of palaces, is a perfect day trip
gallery_cta_desc: Discover comfortable rooms, Wissemare wellness, Bellevue restaurant and the beautiful Mecklenburg Baltic Coast.
room_meta_description: Discover rooms at Sunday Hotel Wismar, including Standard Rooms, Superior Rooms and Family Rooms with air conditioning, orthopedic mattresses, free Wi-Fi and modern amenities.
room_desc: Comfortable rooms with a maritime atmosphere
room_overview_title: Comfortable Rooms at Sunday Hotel Wismar
room_overview_desc: Sunday Hotel Wismar offers 177 modern air-conditioned guest rooms, all equipped with ergonomic orthopedic mattresses, satellite TV, telephone, free Wi-Fi and a private bathroom with bathtub, WC, magnifying mirror and hairdryer. Barrier-free rooms are available on request.
room_room1_desc: Bright and thoughtfully furnished rooms for business or leisure stays.
room_room2_desc: More space and additional comfort, including tea and coffee making facilities.
room_room3_desc: Spacious rooms for parents and children, ideal for family trips to Mecklenburg.
room_pet_desc1: Sunday Hotel Wismar is a pet-friendly hotel. Your four-legged companion is welcome to join you on your Baltic Sea getaway.
room_pet_desc2: Please inform us at the time of booking if you plan to bring a pet and let us know the size of your animal. An additional fee may apply per pet per night. Pets are not permitted inside the dining and wellness facilities.
room_cta_desc: Enjoy comfort, wellness and the Mecklenburg Baltic Coast at Sunday Hotel Wismar.
room_room1_modal: Our bright and thoughtfully furnished standard rooms offer everything you need for a comfortable stay, whether you are visiting for business or leisure. Highlights include air conditioning, orthopedic mattress, flat-screen satellite TV, work desk, telephone, free Wi-Fi and a private bathroom with bathtub, WC, hairdryer and magnifying mirror.
room_room2_modal: Our superior rooms offer additional comfort and space, perfect for guests who want a little extra after a day of sightseeing or meetings. Amenities include air conditioning, orthopedic mattress, flat-screen satellite TV, work desk, telephone, free Wi-Fi, private bathroom with bathtub, WC, hairdryer and magnifying mirror, plus tea and coffee making facilities.
room_room3_modal: Our family rooms provide plenty of space for parents and children. They include a spacious layout, air conditioning, orthopedic mattresses, flat-screen satellite TV, free Wi-Fi and a private bathroom with bathtub, WC and hairdryer. Children’s cots are available on request.
spa_meta_description: Relax at the Wissemare wellness area of Sunday Hotel Wismar with indoor pool, saunas, steam bath, jacuzzis, rooftop terrace and fitness studio.
spa_hero_text: Active relaxation for body, mind and soul at Sunday Hotel Wismar
spa_overview_text: After a day of exploring the coast or the charming streets of Wismar, there is no better place to unwind than the Wissemare wellness area at Sunday Hotel Wismar. Our leisure centre is open year-round and offers a wide range of facilities for guests of all ages.
spa_pool_text: Dive into relaxation in our spacious indoor pool. Whether you want a few refreshing lengths or simply want to float and unwind, our pool is the perfect escape regardless of the weather outside.
spa_sauna_text: Our sauna area includes a Finnish sauna, a log cabin sauna and a steam bath. Warm up, sweat it out and let the stresses of daily life melt away. Cozy bathrobe rental is available.
spa_jacuzzi_text: Treat yourself to a soak in one of our jacuzzis, available for an additional fee, or head up to the rooftop terrace for fresh air and views over the Mecklenburg landscape.
spa_fitness_text: Stay active during your stay in our well-equipped fitness studio. Keep up your workout routine and return home feeling refreshed and energized.
spa_hours_main: The Wissemare wellness area is open year-round and welcomes guests of all ages for indoor swimming, sauna relaxation, steam bathing, jacuzzi moments and fitness.
spa_hours_appointments: Please check current jacuzzi availability, bathrobe rental and any additional fees directly at reception.
spa_cta_text: Relax, recharge and enjoy Wissemare wellness at Sunday Hotel Wismar.
pool_meta_description: Discover the indoor pool at Sunday Hotel Wismar’s Wissemare wellness area, perfect for relaxation, family fun and year-round swimming.
pool_hero_text: Dive into relaxation in the Wissemare wellness area
pool_overview_text: Dive into relaxation in the spacious indoor pool at Sunday Hotel Wismar. Whether you are looking for a few refreshing lengths, a relaxed swim or family water fun, the pool is the perfect escape regardless of the weather outside.
pool_indoor_text: Swim, float or unwind in a comfortable indoor pool environment, open year-round.
pool_wellness_text: Combine your swim with saunas, steam bath, jacuzzis and fitness in the Wissemare area.
pool_relax_text: After a day in Wismar or by the Baltic Sea, the pool is the perfect place to unwind.
pool_cta_text: Enjoy indoor swimming, wellness facilities and family-friendly relaxation at Sunday Hotel Wismar.
pool_indoor_modal: The spacious indoor pool is ideal for refreshing lengths, gentle swimming or simply floating and unwinding, regardless of the weather outside.
pool_wellness_modal: The pool is part of the Wissemare wellness area, where guests can also enjoy the sauna area, steam bath, jacuzzis, rooftop terrace and fitness studio.
pool_relax_modal: After exploring the Baltic coast or the charming streets of Wismar, the pool offers a calm place to recharge body, mind and soul.
family_meta_description: Family holidays at Sunday Hotel Wismar with family rooms, Wissemare pool, outdoor children’s playground, indoor play corner and family-friendly dining.
family_hero_text: Vacations for young and old at Sunday Hotel Wismar
family_overview_text: Sunday Hotel Wismar is a family-friendly hotel. We want both our youngest guests and their parents to feel completely at home. From the Wissemare pool area to the outdoor children’s playground and a dedicated indoor play corner, there is plenty to keep young visitors entertained throughout the day.
family_card1_text: Children will love the indoor pool at Sunday Hotel Wismar. Splash around, play and let the kids burn off some energy whatever the weather.
family_card2_text: Our outdoor children’s playground provides a safe and fun space for younger guests while parents relax nearby.
family_card3_text: A dedicated indoor play corner gives children a welcoming place for games, creativity and relaxed family moments.
family_card4_text: Spacious family rooms offer plenty of space for parents and children, with children’s cots available on request.
family_dining_text: Our restaurant offers children’s menus and a high-chair service. The breakfast and dinner buffets include plenty of options that young guests will enjoy.
family_requirements_text: We are happy to accommodate dietary requirements on request, so the whole family can enjoy a relaxed dining experience.
family_cta_text: Plan your family stay near the Baltic Sea coast with rooms, wellness, play areas and dining for all ages.
events_meta_description: Plan meetings, conferences, seminars, weddings and private events at Sunday Hotel Wismar with 9 flexible conference rooms for up to 350 participants.
events_hero_text: The leading conference hotel in the Wismar region
events_overview_text1: Sunday Hotel Wismar is the largest and most versatile conference hotel in the greater Wismar area. With nine flexible conference rooms accommodating up to 350 participants, the hotel is ideal for business meetings, seminars, training sessions, conferences, weddings and private celebrations.
events_overview_text2: All conference rooms benefit from natural daylight, modern AV equipment and dedicated support from our experienced events team.
events_space1_text: Choose from nine flexible conference rooms ranging from 42 m² to 343 m², suitable for meetings, seminars, training sessions and conferences.
events_space2_text: Celebrate your special day near the UNESCO World Heritage city of Wismar. Our events team supports setup, catering, floral decorations and accommodation for your guests.
events_space3_text: From intimate team meetings to large-scale conferences, Sunday Hotel Wismar offers state-of-the-art facilities and professional support for smooth event delivery.
events_amenity1_text: Modern presentation and conference technology for professional meetings and events.
events_amenity2_text: Every conference room benefits from natural daylight and flexible arrangements.
events_amenity3_text: Catering and half-board options are available for meetings and celebrations.
events_amenity4_text: 160 parking spaces on-site, including 3 EV charging stations.
events_table_row1_features: Natural daylight, flexible setup, AV technology
events_capacity_note: Room setup and capacity can be adapted to your event requirements.
events_package1_item3: Dedicated support from the events team
events_cta_text: Our experienced events team will help you organize meetings, conferences, weddings and celebrations at Sunday Hotel Wismar.
